title: WorkerLifecycleTransitions
description: Explicit state machine defining valid worker lifecycle transitions. Inspired by LangGraph DAG model for auditable, deterministic state changes. Referenced by active-workers.schema.json status field.

states.description: All valid worker lifecycle states. Matches active-workers.schema.json status enum.

terminalStates.description: States with no outbound transitions. Once a worker reaches a terminal state, it cannot transition again.

transitions.description: All valid state transitions. Any transition not in this list is invalid.

trigger.description: Event or condition that causes this transition.

guard.description: Precondition that must be true for the transition to be valid.

actor.description: Role or system component that performs the transition.

auditRequired.description: Whether this transition must be logged for audit trail.
